COMPLEX LITIGATION HEARING OF PETITION FOR COORDINATION HELD ON SEP-08-2010, IN DEPT. 304. THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION FOR COORDINATION. THIS ACTION SHALL BE COORDINATED INTO THE REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES, JCCP 4631. THE COURT WILL PREPARE THE WRITTEN ORDER. THE ACTION IS CONTINUED TO OCT-13-2010, AT 12:00 PM, IN DEPT. 304 FOR AN INFORMAL LUNCH CONFERENCE. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER JANET POND; DEPT. 304.
